blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No user-visible related-articles surface or related-articles API route exists in the current build, so exclusion-of-self behavior cannot be validated through the real user surface.

orchestratorOverride.reason: VAL-TAG-003 moved to article-detail-page feature in milestone 3 (public-site). The related-articles surface is a public-facing feature that does not belong in the admin-focused articles-categories milestone.
